decisions.rationale: IR re-read (ir/inventory.json) confirms ai_RNbBHYVP is profile-email-group (Group under ai_RNbBHYVL), ai_RNbBHYVQ is the email label Text child, ai_RNbBHYWD is recovery-callout Text under ai_RNbBHYWB, and ai_RNbBHYWG is the sobriety label Text under ai_RNbBHYWF — routes.ts PROFILE_EMAIL_LABEL_BUBBLE_ID and PROFILE_SOBRIETY_LABEL_BUBBLE_ID misassign VP/WD to label roles, and SettingsProfileTab places those markers on Label nodes instead of group wrappers (VM/VP unmarked, VQ/WG unmarked). Valid ui-fidelity gap on named decompose ui_refs, but SET-02 AC-1..AC-3 gate VG/VH/VL/WA/WF/VO/VR/WH/WT only; criteria_audit, functional_audit, and functional_ok all pass. Downstream SET-03-coaching-tab-and-save depends_on SET-01/ENUM/DS, not profile-tab bubble-id hierarchy. ~10-line fix: add PROFILE_EMAIL_GROUP_BUBBLE_ID/PROFILE_SOBRIETY_LABEL_BUBBLE_ID constants aligned to IR, wrapper divs for VM/VP, move VQ/WG markers — batch as SET-02 bubble-id marker polish before visual QA.

IR re-read confirms ai_RNbBHYWF (profile-sobriety-group) subtree contains only ai_RNbBHYWG sobriety label and ai_RNbBHYWH date picker — no Switch or recovery-mode toggle. SettingsProfileTab renders a prototype-only Switch bound to recoveryModeActive persisted via profileApi onboarding_data; decompose scope covers recovery section and sobriety date picker, not a toggle control. AC-2 and FV-1 pass on sobriety date binding; extra control does not block SET-03 or other downstream depends_on gates. Drop the Switch or gate behind a follow-on item when Bubble adds an explicit recovery-mode control — defer to SET-02 IR parity polish alongside C-1.

Coverage preflight.gaps still lists pre-rewrite failures (missing UpdateCredentials/bTIhj path, absent header markers, generic styling) although criteria_audit AC-3, FV-3, and review ui_evidence now pass on email-change reauth, card header nodes, and style_ref tokens. coverage-artifact hygiene only — no implement blocker, no AC regression. Refresh preflight.gaps on the next coverage pass for SET-02 to reflect resolved items only.

summary: 0 fix_now, 3 defer, 0 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, functional_ok=true, no blockers, all ACs pass. Deferred: C-1 routes.ts bubble-id constant misassignment and missing VM/VP/VQ/WG wrapper markers (SET-02 IR marker polish); C-2 prototype-only recovery-mode Switch not in Bubble ai_RNbBHYWF subtree (drop or gate in same polish pass); C-3 stale coverage preflight.gaps (refresh on next coverage run). ok_to_advance=true, rewrite_required=false.
